artifact_plan.diagram_intent: Split-lane flow diagram showing System 1 running continuously on the left and System 2 activating on the right under four named triggers (novel situation, contradiction, complex calculation, high-stakes choice), with an arrow from System 2 back to System 1 labelled 'check / override', and a capacity gauge beside System 2 indicating depletion over time.
artifact_plan.depth_signals: Four sub-concepts in Core Concepts (definition, working memory, activation conditions, limitations/interplay) plus a worked example and misconceptions section; fits standard 15-25 min band.
